positive: A vibrant, maximalist illustration of a celestial jungle scene. The main focus is a stylized, deep-sea diving astronaut floating amidst giant bioluminescent flora and fauna. Include oversized, stylized flowers with deep indigo petals, luminous coral formations in neon turquoise and magenta, and gentle, glowing streams of golden particulate matter. The composition must be radially symmetrical and highly graphic, emphasizing strong, bold silhouettes and contrasting light sources (bioluminescence). Style: Pop Art meets Art Nouveau, rendered as a clean, crisp vector illustration with thick, noticeable outlines. Color Palette: Midnight blue, electric turquoise, magenta, and metallic gold. Composition: Centered, suitable for repeat pattern or single apparel print. Lighting: High contrast, glowing from within the flora. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, low detail, noise, watermark, signature, text, graffiti, artifacts, poorly drawn hands, multiple limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, bokeh, realistic photography, cinematic, gloomy, messy background
